visual_summary: The Ripple component is a visually appealing UI element that creates a ripple effect. It is commonly used to provide feedback to users when they click or hover over an element. Use this component to add a touch of elegance to your UI.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready loader component with the following characteristics:

Name: Ripple
Description: The Ripple component is a visually appealing UI element that creates a ripple effect. It is commonly used to provide feedback to users when they click or hover over an element. Use this component to add a touch of elegance to your UI.
Style: material design, clean, premium
Interactions: animated, hover, clickable
Tags: feedback, interactivity, ripple effect

- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
